FlavourText.en:
The Architect of the Hoard gathered every piece of Vaal
history he could, hoping to preserve them against the end.
She allowed him this, for it served her ends as well.
FlavourText.zh:
窖藏建筑师搜罗尽瓦尔的每一段历史，
渴望在终焉降临前将其保存。
她默许了他此举，因这亦遂她心愿。

Description.en: Use to prevent the next [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilisation] of a Room
Description.zh: 使用以可防止一个房间下次发生[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of Destruction ensured his own demise in an
'accidental' explosion. She ordered his pieces gathered, his
body reassembled and transcended. Death was no escape.
FlavourText.zh:
毁灭建筑师在一场“意外”爆炸中
亲手葬送了自己。她却下令拾其碎躯，重
组并超脱其肉身——死亡亦无处可逃。

Description.en: Use to reroll a [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Room] in the Temple
Description.zh: 使用以重掷神庙中的[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间]

FlavourText.en: The Architect of the Nexus proposed the Temple of Atzoatl as a prototype. He thought the project would keep him safe. Instead all he achieved was building her another seat of power.
FlavourText.zh: 枢纽建筑师将阿佐亚特神庙奉为原型提出。他以为这工程能保全自己。到头来，不过是又为她筑起一座权座罢了。

Description.en: Use to increase the Tier of a Room (does not stack)
Description.zh: 使用以提升一个房间的等阶（无法叠加）

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of Expansion was always distant, working on
projects at the edge of the Empire. His excuses vanished soon
after his daughter was... given... a position at the Royal Temple.
FlavourText.zh:
扩充建筑师总在远方，于帝国边陲经营着他的工程。
直到他的女儿被……授予……皇家神庙的职位后，
他的种种托辞，便很快消散无踪了。

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of Power chose to bury himself in his work,
seeking freedom of the mind. She followed him even there,
learning the theories, ensuring he did not stray in his intent.
FlavourText.zh:
能量建筑师选择埋首于工作，寻求心灵的自由。
她却连此地也紧随而至，研习理论，
确保他永不偏离她既定的旨意。

Description.en: Use to increase Maximum [IncursionCrystal|Crystal] Capacity by 6 (up to 60)
Description.zh: 使用以使[IncursionCrystal|水晶]最大容量增加 6（上限为 60 ）

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of the Guild was more than happy to create a
continual stream of trinkets and baubles to distract the
Queen, but, in truth, she barely looked at any of them.
FlavourText.zh:
公会建筑师极乐意造出源源不断的小玩意儿，
以供女王分心消遣——
可实际上，她几乎不曾瞥上其中任何一件。

Description.en: Use to increase Maximum Medallion Capacity by 1 (up to 6)
Description.zh: 使用以使纹章最大容量增加 1（上限为 6 ）

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of the Vault pleaded with nobles and suitors,
begging them to stop sending treasure to the Queen. He
could never go home until his task was complete...
FlavourText.zh:
宝库建筑师曾向贵族与追求者们苦苦哀求，
恳请他们停止向女王进献珍宝。
使命未完，他便永无归期……

Description.en: Use to place an additional [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Room Card] after defeating the Architect
Description.zh: 使用以在击败建筑师后额外放置一张[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间卡牌]

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of the Forge kept his hearth busy,
for the Queen's eye lingered on the idle. Her halls stood
adorned with his desperate artisanship.
FlavourText.zh:
熔炉建筑师，炉火不息，
因女王目光所及，不容懈怠。殿堂巍峨，
尽饰其呕心沥血之艺。

Description.en:
Use to reroll the Room Cards available for placement
[IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Room Cards] may not be rerolled this way
Description.zh:
使用以重掷可供放置的房间卡牌
[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间卡牌]无法通过此方式重掷

FlavourText.en:
The Architect of Concealment wove secrets into stone,
with passages and powers none were meant to see.
His renown rose in the shadows of his designs.
FlavourText.zh:
匿影建筑师，将秘密织入石中，
通道与威能，无人得见其踪。
他的声名，在设计之影中崛起。

Description.en:
Use to add one to the number of random [Waystone] Modifiers added to your Temple. This number reduces by 1 for every 10 Temples opened. 
Modifiers will be randomised each time you open a new Temple. Temples can be affected by up to 8 Modifiers.
Description.zh:
使用以使你的神庙增加一个随机[Waystone|引路石]词缀数量。每开启 10 座神庙，此数量减少 1 。
每次开启新神庙时，词缀将重新随机生成。神庙最多可受 8 个词缀影响。
